taskSummary: Repair GOV.UK frontend CSS artifact and runtime page chrome styles.
implementationDecisions: Accessibility workflow builds GOV.UK CSS before pa11y serves public assets.
Committed GOV.UK fallback CSS includes the page chrome selectors missing in the screenshot.
Deploy asset guardrail requires header, service navigation, phase banner, grid, details and summary-card selectors.
residualRisks: Committed CSS remains a deploy-safe fallback rather than the full generated GOV.UK Frontend distribution.
GitHub Actions must complete on the latest commit.
